name: Fedora Silverblue
tagline: Fedora's flagship immutable desktop with atomic updates
description: Fedora Silverblue is an immutable variant of Fedora Workstation that replaces the traditional package model with an OSTree-based image. The core OS is read-only and updated atomically — you can always roll back to the previous working state. User applications live in Flatpak sandboxes, and the optional Toolbox/Distrobox integration lets you run any container as a transparent development environment. Silverblue is the reference implementation for the immutable Linux desktop concept and the upstream for projects like Bazzite and Bluefin. Ideal for developers who want a stable, reproducible base that never breaks.
